name: app-connect-aroflo
description: RingCentral App Connect connector server for AroFlo.

APP_SERVER.description: Public HTTPS URL of this Heroku app, for example https://your-app.herokuapp.com.

OVERRIDE_APP_SERVER.description: Same public HTTPS URL as APP_SERVER; used by App Connect core when returning crmManifest.

APP_SERVER_SECRET_KEY.description: Shared secret used by App Connect to sign and encrypt server-side data.

IS_PROD.description: Production flag for App Connect core.

AROFLO_U_ENCODED.description: AroFlo uEncoded value from Site Administration > AroFlo API.

AROFLO_P_ENCODED.description: AroFlo pEncoded value from Site Administration > AroFlo API.

AROFLO_ORG_ENCODED.description: AroFlo orgEncoded value from Site Administration > AroFlo API.

AROFLO_HOST_IP.description: Optional public outbound IP if AroFlo requires HostIP.

AROFLO_NOTE_FILTER.description: AroFlo ClientNote filter value for created notes.

AROFLO_NOTE_STICKY.description: Whether created AroFlo ClientNotes are sticky.

RINGCENTRAL_SERVER.description: RingCentral server URL if required by this App Connect setup.

RINGCENTRAL_CLIENT_ID.description: RingCentral client id if required by this App Connect setup.

RINGCENTRAL_CLIENT_SECRET.description: RingCentral client secret if required by this App Connect setup.
